mono.value: DM Mono, ui-monospace, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, monospace
mono.description: Monospace typeface (Studio Cartelli extension — M3 defines only brand/plain)

weight-regular.description: Polymath's "Regular" cut is weight 500 — there is no true 400 in use
